name: Neuroforce Golf
about: Neuroforce Golf is an indoor golf training facility located in Culver City, CA. They offer a variety of services including simulator bookings, private lessons, lesson packages, and club fitting. The venue provides multiple simulator bays for practice and play sessions. Membership options are available for regular access. The facility is affiliated with Indoor Golf Club CA and emphasizes technology and research in its offerings. Pricing includes session-based bookings for simulator time and lessons, along with package deals and membership options.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium simulator technology for realistic play and practice
Comprehensive lesson packages available with professional instructors
Club fitting services for optimizing equipment
Membership options for regular, cost-effective access

food_and_drink.notes: No food service mentioned; BYOB likely allowed
No bar service mentioned; BYOB likely allowed

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you should bring your own clubs for the best experience, though club fitting services are available on-site.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: BYOB (Bring Your Own Beverages) is likely permitted, though no food service is mentioned.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole round take on the simulator?
faq.answer: Simulator time is typically booked by the hour, with 18 holes taking approximately 1-2 hours depending on player speed.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: No specific kid-friendly amenities or programs are mentioned, though families could book simulator sessions.
